base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tileset_town_castle — a tile (tile_atlas) from 1986 dragon quest. Town/castle atlas — wooden-plank houses, thatched roofs, castle walls, gates, fountain, trees, fences, shops signs (weapon/armor/inn/herb shops), red carpet, throne-dais. Used across Tantegel, Brecconary, Garinham, Kol, Rimuldar, Cantlin, Hauksness. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
